text:
/ci1 1 また、強そうな相手……
武器も持ってるし、少し距離をとって
様子を見た方がいいかも。

/ci1 1 Another tough-looking foe. It's armed,
so you might want to keep back and observe its
movements before charging in.

また、強そうな相手……
武器も持ってるし、少し距離をとって
様子を見た方がいいかも。

Another tough-looking foe. It's armed, so you
might want to keep back and observe its
movements before charging in.
